name: block-rate
description: Measure the actual block rate of third-party services caused by ad blockers and privacy tools.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format esm --minify && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format cjs --outfile index.cjs --minify && bun build ./src/react/index.ts --outdir ./dist/react --target browser --format esm --external react --minify && bun build ./src/next/index.ts --outdir ./dist/next --target browser --format esm --external react --minify
